evals.prompt: I'm done working on the avalara-tax app. Can you create the ZIP for version 0.2.8? It's a backend-only tax app with hooks and services.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Backend-only architecture, verify cartridges/ and impex/ exist, no storefront-next/, generate ZIP with proper naming, compute SHA256, update root manifest, verify tasksList.json present

assertions.name: detects backend-only architecture
assertions.description: Should identify cartridges/ present, no storefront-next/

assertions.name: does not include storefront-next in ZIP
assertions.description: Backend-only should have no UI directories

evals.prompt: Package my product reviews widget app version 1.0.0. It's UI-only with React components and locales, no backend stuff.
evals.expected_output: Should detect UI-only architecture, verify storefront-next/ exists with target-config.json and locales, no cartridges/ or impex/, generate ZIP, compute SHA256, update manifest

assertions.name: detects UI-only architecture
assertions.description: Should identify storefront-next/ present, no cartridges/

assertions.name: checks all three locales present
assertions.description: Verifies en-US, en-GB, it-IT directories exist

assertions.name: generates ZIP without backend directories
assertions.description: No cartridges/ or impex/ in ZIP

evals.prompt: Create the ZIP for my loyalty program app v1.0.0. It's fullstack - has both storefront components and backend hooks for points calculation.
evals.expected_output: Should detect Fullstack architecture, verify both storefront-next/ AND cartridges/ AND impex/ exist, generate complete ZIP with all directories, compute SHA256

assertions.name: detects fullstack architecture
assertions.description: Should identify both storefront-next/ and cartridges/ present

assertions.name: checks all locales for UI
assertions.description: en-US, en-GB, it-IT present in storefront-next

assertions.name: generates complete fullstack ZIP
assertions.description: ZIP contains both UI and backend directories

assertions.name: updates manifest with correct domain
assertions.description: Root manifest entry has loyalty domain

assertions.name: verifies tasksList.json includes both UI and backend tasks

evals.prompt: Can you package the shipping app? I made some updates.
evals.expected_output: Should check catalog.json, detect if version already exists, force version bump if needed, ask user for new version, possibly trigger /bump-version skill

assertions.name: checks catalog.json for existing versions
assertions.description: Reads catalog.json to see version history

assertions.name: detects version conflict
assertions.description: Identifies if current version already published

assertions.name: asks user for new version number

evals.prompt: Generate the ZIP for my new payment gateway app, version 1.0.0. This is the first time packaging it.
evals.expected_output: Should detect new app (no catalog.json), package normally, create catalog.json with INIT values, update root manifest with new entry

assertions.name: creates catalog.json with INIT
assertions.description: New catalog.json has version: INIT, tag: INIT

assertions.name: adds new entry to root manifest
assertions.description: Creates new entry in appropriate domain array

assertions.name: computes SHA256 for manifest
assertions.description: Hash included in new manifest entry

evals.prompt: Build the app package for the tax app. I want to make sure we don't have multiple ZIP versions lying around.
evals.expected_output: Should delete old ZIP files before creating new one, generate new ZIP, verify only latest version exists

assertions.name: deletes old ZIP versions
assertions.description: Removes previous ZIP files before creating new one

assertions.name: generates new ZIP
assertions.description: Creates fresh ZIP with current version

assertions.name: verifies single ZIP exists
assertions.description: Only latest version ZIP in directory
